Department No. F. 22(2)-PD/2002 (P./) Dated, Jun, 2013 NOTIFICATION Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred under Section 3 of the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (28 of 1958) the State Government, vide Notification No. 22(2)/PD/2002(PJ) dated 08.03.2013, had declared 34 Police Stations us disturbed in full and 6 Police Stations as disturbed in part. Whereas the matter was reviewed and after consideration of the overall law and order sit clarion of the state, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (28 of 1958), the Governor is pleased to declare the Police Stations shown in Schedule-I as disturbed in full (whole area) and Police Stations shown in Schedule-II as disturbed only in part, i.e., in respect of Revenue Villages as indicated in Col. No. 3, with effect from the 5th June 2013. This is in supersession of the Notification issued vide, No. 22(2)/PD/2002(13.6 dated 08.03.2013. By Order of the Govern ♦(5 (Dr. D. NOTIFICATION 24(twenty-four) Police Stations were declared fully disturbed and 6(six) Police Stations were declared partly disturbed as per the schedule annexed in Notification No.F.22(2)-PD/2002(P.I) dated 25.11.2014. The matter has been further reviewed by the Government and keeping in view the overall improvement in security scenario in the State, it has been decided to completely withdraw the aforesaid Notification with immediate effect. 2. Director General of Police, Tripura may immediately inform all the security agencies accordingly. (A. Deb) <— Under Secretary to the Government of Tripura Copy to :- 1. The Director General of Police, Tripura for information and necessary action. 2. The Secretary to the Governor, Raj Bhavan, Tripura. 3. The Principal Secretary to Chief Minister, Tripura: 4. The Deputy Inspector General, CRPF, Ushabazar, West Tripura 10.The Brigadier, Assam Rifles, Tripura 11.The Station Headquarter, C/O 99 APO. 12.The Director, Information & Cultural Affairs, Tripura with a request to publish the Notification by way of Press Note in the Local News Paper immediately. 13.The Director, Printing and Stationery Department, Tripura with a request to publish above Notification in an extra ordinary issue of the Tripura Gazette of date. 50(fifty) spare copies of the Notification may also kindly be passed on the Home Department simultaneously with the publication of the Notification.
